hero.title: Join the
hero.subtitle: We're looking for brilliant minds who want to build tomorrow's digital.

culture.title: Our
culture.subtitle: What defines us and makes WareBi a unique place to work.

autonomy.title: Autonomy and responsibility
autonomy.description: We trust every team member. You have the freedom to take initiative and shape your work.

learning.title: Continuous learning
learning.description: Training budget, dedicated tech watch time, conferences. We invest in your professional growth.

collaboration.title: Collaboration and transparency
collaboration.description: No heavy hierarchy. Direct communication, collective decisions, regular feedback.

remote.title: Remote-friendly
remote.description: Work from wherever you want. Paris office available, but not mandatory. Total flexibility.

jobs.title: Open
jobs.subtitle: Join us to work on exciting projects and make a difference.

spontaneous.title: Spontaneous
spontaneous.subtitle: Can't find the right position? Send us your spontaneous application. We carefully review all applications.
spontaneous.success_message: We'll get back to you within 7 business days.

partner.title: Become a
partner.subtitle: Are you a consulting firm, agency or freelancer? Let's collaborate to offer the best to our clients.
